_doc: Per-set dataset generation parameters for set-6 (15 spectra, CDs@SiO2 nanocomposites). Sphere geometry (Savchenko et al. 2022). Temperature series. MATLAB fit ranges: B0=3351.2-3354.1 G, dB=5.1-8.4 G, p~3.24-3.25 (very narrow range — likely temperature-invariant). Ranges widened with ~30% margin below and above to cover unseen regimes.
